languages.text: "Династия превыше всего, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Я рад, что вы это понимаете".
"The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."
languages.original_text: "Династия превыше всего, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Я рад, что вы это понимаете".

traits.locale_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."
"The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."
"The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."
"The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."
"The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

languages.text: "Die Dynastie steht an erster Stelle, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ich bin froh, dass Ihr das versteht."
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: "Die Dynastie steht an erster Stelle, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Ich bin froh, dass Ihr das versteht."

languages.text: « La dynastie passe avant tout, en effet. Au moins, vous le comprenez. »
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: « La dynastie passe avant tout, en effet. Au moins, vous le comprenez. »

languages.text: «La dinastía es lo primero, hereder{mf|o|a}. Me alegra ver que lo entiende».
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: «La dinastía es lo primero, hereder{mf|o|a}. Me alegra ver que lo entiende».

languages.text: "Hanedanlık, her şeyden önce gelir vârisim. Bunu anlamana sevindim."
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlık, her şeyden önce gelir vârisim. Bunu anlamana sevindim."

languages.text: “王朝至上，我的继承人。我很高兴你能认识到这一点。”
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: “王朝至上，我的继承人。我很高兴你能认识到这一点。”

languages.text: 「この王朝は、私の後継者よ。君がそれを理解してくれて嬉しい。」
languages.original_text: "The dynasty comes first, my heir. I am glad you understand that."

traits.locale_text: 「この王朝は、私の後継者よ。君がそれを理解してくれて嬉しい。」
